response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The first part of the video matches the provided song lyrics reference perfectly. 
2. JSON Usage: Fully used the provided song lyrics and translation for the first section (00:00 - 02:42). The subsequent transition scene and conversation between Ouro Kronii and IRyS (02:42 - end) was translated and transcribed 100% manually, as it was not included in the song lyrics reference.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are timed tightly to vocal activations. Aggressive truncation was utilized during the fast-paced song chorus and rapid-fire banter in the cage/gazebo argument to prevent any cascading delays.
